name: a stack entry records its provenance — source stack-add and a trigger matching the CLI invocation
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add aws --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; e=c["stack"].find{|x|x["namespace"]=="aws"}; exit(e && e["source"]=="stack-add" && e["trigger"]=="--stack-add aws" ? 0:1)' && echo stack-provenance 1>&2
